# agentickit

> Wire an AI copilot into your React app's state, actions, and forms. Three hooks, one sidebar, optional `.pilot/` skills folder.

`agentickit` is a small (~1,500 LoC) React library that sits between the Vercel AI SDK 6 and a consumer app. It ships three hooks (`usePilotState`, `usePilotAction`, `usePilotForm`), a `<Pilot>` provider, a `<PilotSidebar>` component, and a server-side `createPilotHandler`.

This repo ships a `.pilot/` folder at the root as both dogfood and the canonical onboarding pack for LLM agents. Cold-start path for an agent with no prior memory: read `.pilot/AGENTS.md`, then `.pilot/RESOLVER.md` to match the user's task to a skill, then the matching `SKILL.md`. Every code snippet in `.pilot/` compiles against the current tree. The source under `packages/agentickit/src/` is the ground truth.

## Start here

- [.pilot/AGENTS.md](.pilot/AGENTS.md): entry point covering what this repo is, house rules, and read order.
- [.pilot/RESOLVER.md](.pilot/RESOLVER.md): trigger-to-skill routing table. Read this to pick which `SKILL.md` applies.
- [README.md](README.md): the public README covering install, 60-second demo, API tables, FAQ, and security notes.

## Skills (procedural guides)

- [.pilot/skills/install-and-setup/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/install-and-setup/SKILL.md): install `agentickit` into an existing React app (Next.js App Router happy path; Bun / Workers / Hono also work). Wire the server route, provider, and sidebar.
- [.pilot/skills/choose-provider/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/choose-provider/SKILL.md): pick a model provider. Covers auto-detection, the seven supported prefixes, Vercel AI Gateway fallback, and the escape hatch for Ollama / Azure / Bedrock.
- [.pilot/skills/register-state/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/register-state/SKILL.md): expose React state via `usePilotState`. Covers the auto-registered `update_<name>` tool when a setter is supplied.
- [.pilot/skills/register-action/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/register-action/SKILL.md): register a typed, AI-callable tool via `usePilotAction`. Zod-inferred args, `mutating:` flag guidance.
- [.pilot/skills/register-form/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/register-form/SKILL.md): attach a `react-hook-form` instance via `usePilotForm`. Auto-registers `set_<name>_field`, `submit_<name>`, `reset_<name>`.
- [.pilot/skills/customize-sidebar/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/customize-sidebar/SKILL.md): theme, relabel, reposition `<PilotSidebar>` via CSS variables. Also when to drop it and build custom UI from `PilotChatContext`.
- [.pilot/skills/write-custom-backend/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/write-custom-backend/SKILL.md): configure `createPilotHandler`. Covers the full options surface (`model`, `system`, `maxSteps`, `getProviderOptions`), per-request overrides, and the error envelope.
- [.pilot/skills/write-a-consumer-skill/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/write-a-consumer-skill/SKILL.md): author a `SKILL.md` inside a consumer app's own `.pilot/` folder. Frontmatter shape, resolver table, binding contract.
- [.pilot/skills/debug-and-test/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/debug-and-test/SKILL.md): run the workspace, tests, and todo example. pnpm layout, tsup build, Vitest config, common failure modes.
- [.pilot/skills/contribute/SKILL.md](.pilot/skills/contribute/SKILL.md): extend `agentickit` as a contributor. Add a hook, component, provider prefix, protocol field, or example. Size budget and patch shape.

## Conventions

- [.pilot/conventions/quality.md](.pilot/conventions/quality.md): cross-cutting rules that apply to every code change. Read before writing code.
- [.pilot/conventions/commit-style.md](.pilot/conventions/commit-style.md): conventional-commit format used across the repo. Read before committing.

## Architecture

- [packages/agentickit/README.md](packages/agentickit/README.md): the package-level README covering the public API surface, exports, and peer-dep matrix.
- [packages/agentickit/src/index.ts](packages/agentickit/src/index.ts): client entry point with the three hooks, `<Pilot>`, `<PilotSidebar>`, and context.
- [packages/agentickit/src/server/index.ts](packages/agentickit/src/server/index.ts): server entry point for `createPilotHandler` and types. Never import from client code.
- [packages/agentickit/src/protocol/index.ts](packages/agentickit/src/protocol/index.ts): parsers for the `.pilot/` markdown format (`RESOLVER.md` + `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`). The server handler auto-loads the folder at startup via `loadPilotProtocol` in `src/server/pilot-protocol-loader.ts`.

## Example

- [examples/todo/README.md](examples/todo/README.md): minimal end-to-end todo app. Read this to see every hook used in ~100 LoC of page code.
- [examples/todo/app/page.tsx](examples/todo/app/page.tsx): the single page that wires `<Pilot>`, `usePilotState`, and `usePilotAction` against a todo list.
